data.body: LANDED: crust-fetch-stump epic + all 7 children (S1-S6 + module-size split 458f) MERGED to main via Gerrit (changes 431,425-430), replicated to GitHub. origin/main now 26893e6d9. Both gates passed on every change: Verified+1 (CI) AND LLM-Review+1. All tickets closed+signed (completion-verifier). Shared session-id tooling delivered in src/rebar/_commands/session_id.py (resolve_session_id/resolve_harness/resolve_remote_session), consumed by BOTH session_log._resolve_session_fp and transition_close._resolve_session + claim/transition write path. Module-size gate resolved by extracting the reducer replay engine to src/rebar/reducer/_replay.py (split, not allowlist). Epic COMPLETE.
